app.name: Outfit Mirror AI
app.headline: Today starts with a better outfit

onboarding.title: Let's learn your style
onboarding.description: Pick a few preferences so suggestions feel personal from day one.
onboarding.styleTitle: What style feels most like you?
onboarding.styleDescription: We'll use this to rank outfits more naturally.
onboarding.colorsDescription: We'll prioritize these colors. You can change them later.
onboarding.fitTitle: Set your fit and proportion basics
onboarding.fitDescription: These details guide outfit suggestions in a supportive way.

home.title: Today
home.description: A clear outfit suggestion based on occasion, season, and your wardrobe.
home.aiQuickDescription: Review an outfit photo, add clothes from a photo, or update your appearance profile.

home2.title: Your personal AI stylist
home2.description: Show your outfit, get clear feedback, and preview a better version on you.
home2.emptyDescription: Start with one photo in just a few seconds.

ads.label: Sponsored area
ads.placeholder: Free plan ad placement can appear here.

wardrobe.title: Wardrobe
wardrobe.description: Search, filter, and manage your clothes in a clean grid.
wardrobe.searchPlaceholder: Search by color, type, season, or style
wardrobe.emptyDescription: Change the filter or add a new clothing item to your wardrobe.

improve.title: Wardrobe recommendations
improve.description: Highlights missing essentials and smart additions that would make your outfits stronger.
improve.empty: Your wardrobe looks balanced across the basics. Try a few outfit suggestions for more specific recommendations.

reasons.neutralShoes: Your wardrobe lacks versatile neutral shoes; this would complete many outfits easily.
reasons.smartCasual: This would improve your smart casual and everyday outfits.
reasons.darkBottoms: A dark bottom would create stronger contrast with more tops.
reasons.layering: This would help build more structured and layered outfits.
reasons.formalOccasions: This would strengthen work, wedding, engagement, and formal event outfits.
reasons.workLooks: This gives you a clean and reliable base for work and classic looks.
reasons.warmWeather: This makes warm-weather casual outfits easier and more flexible.
reasons.preferredColors: This adds more outfit options around your preferred colors.
reasons.rainReady: This gives you a safer shoe option for rainy days and darker outfits.

wardrobe2.manualDescription: Enter item details without a photo

studio.title: AI Studio
studio.description: All photo-based premium styling tools in one place.
studio.heroDescription: Analyze your outfit, add clothes from photos, and turn appearance context into personal recommendations.
studio.outfitReviewDescription: Upload an outfit photo and get an AI style score with improvement suggestions.
studio.addFromPhotoDescription: Analyze a clothing photo, edit the suggested fields, and save it to your wardrobe.
studio.appearanceDescription: Update your appearance profile and photos for more personal style guidance.
studio.seeOnMeDescription: Move the selected outfit into a premium preview flow using your appearance profile.
studio.seeOnMeReadyDescription: Your saved appearance profile and selected outfit will work together here.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.description: Save and revisit outfits you liked or recently generated.
favorites.historyEmpty: No outfit suggestion has been generated in this session yet.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage language, appearance preferences, premium status, and saved looks.
profile.savedLooksEmpty: No saved or recently suggested outfits yet.

profile2.manageInAppStore: Manage your subscription through the App Store.
profile2.privacyDescription: Photos and personal style data are used only for the features you choose.
profile2.helpDescription: Get support for purchases, photo uploads, and AI features.

messages.outfitLiked: Outfit liked. Future suggestions will lean this way.
messages.outfitDisliked: Outfit disliked. Future suggestions will avoid similar picks.
messages.applePurchaseUnavailable: Purchase cannot be started on this device right now. Please try again later.
messages.applePurchaseFailed: Purchase could not be completed. Please try again.
messages.appleSubscriptionExpired: This subscription appears to be expired. You can try restoring purchases.
messages.appleVerificationUnavailable: Subscription verification is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
messages.applePurchaseTimeout: The purchase response took longer than expected. Please try again.
messages.applePurchasePending: Purchase completed, but the subscription is not active yet. Please check again shortly.
messages.applePurchaseVerifyingTimeout: Purchase verification took longer than expected. Please try again.
messages.appleAlreadyPurchasedChecking: This purchase already looks active. Checking it now...
messages.appleAlreadyPurchasedRestored: Purchase is already active. Premium is unlocked.
messages.appleRestoreFailed: Purchases could not be restored. Please try again.
messages.appleRestoreEmpty: No active subscription was found for this Apple account.
messages.appleBillingUnavailable: Subscriptions are not available on this device.
messages.appleProductsUnavailable: Subscription options could not be loaded. Please check App Store setup and try again.
messages.subscriptionsIosOnly: Subscriptions are available in the iOS app.
messages.paymentFailed: Payment could not be completed. Please try again.
messages.paymentPending: Payment returned, but premium could not be verified yet. Please try refreshing.
messages.paymentConfigMissing: The payment service is not available right now. Please try again later.
messages.apiBaseUrlMissing: Purchase completed with Apple, but the subscription verification server could not be reached. Please check the backend URL.
messages.aiConfigMissing: OpenAI API key is missing on the backend.
messages.aiReviewNeeded: Could not analyze perfectly, please adjust.
messages.aiUsageNearLimit: You are approaching today's AI usage limit.
messages.aiUsageLimitReached: Today's AI usage limit has been reached.
messages.aiServiceBusy: Our AI styling service is temporarily busy. Please try again shortly.
messages.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again in a little while.
messages.dailyLimitReached: Daily limit reached. Upgrade to premium.
messages.dailyLimitReachedDescription: Upgrade to Premium for unlimited outfits.
messages.actionFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
messages.suggestionUnavailable: There are not enough matching clothes for this outfit. Add a few more wardrobe items.
messages.occasionUnavailable: Not enough suitable items for this occasion.
messages.moreClothesForVariety: More clothing items are needed for additional outfit combinations.

addClothes.title: Add clothes
addClothes.description: Build your wardrobe one piece at a time.
addClothes.aiAnalysisDescription: The clothing in the photo is being analyzed with short structured output.
addClothes.aiAnalysisEditable: Review and edit the AI suggestions before saving.
addClothes.aiAnalysisNeedsReview: Could not analyze perfectly, please adjust the fields.
addClothes.aiAnalysisFailed: The photo could not be analyzed. You can fill the fields manually.
addClothes.mockAnalysisDescription: Review and edit the AI suggestions before saving.
addClothes.noSelectedItems: Select at least one item to add.
addClothes.addFailedDetailed: Could not add clothing. Check the backend connection and console logs. Status: {{status}} · Message: {{message}}

outfit.title: Suggest Outfit
outfit.description: One strong context-aware outfit from your wardrobe.
outfit.emptyDescription: Add a top, bottom, shoes, and any cold-weather layer. Then tap Suggest Outfit.
outfit.readyDescription: Choose occasion and season, then tap Suggest Outfit.

notes.noWeather: No weather data was used for this suggestion.
notes.coldWithJacket: Cold weather: added a jacket layer.
notes.coldWithoutJacket: Cold weather: chose a warmer top. Add a jacket for better cold-weather suggestions.
notes.hot: Hot weather: preferred a tshirt and lighter colors.
notes.mild: Mild weather: used the regular outfit rules.

outfit.ruleSummary: Avoids same-color tops and bottoms, prefers dark-light contrast, treats black, white, and gray as easy neutrals, and adjusts for weather, preferences, and outfit feedback.

closet.title: Closet
closet.emptyDescription: Start with one top, one bottom, and shoes.

likedOutfits.title: Liked outfits
likedOutfits.description: Outfits you liked before appear here.

premium.title: Subscription
premium.description: Manage your subscription status, language, and personal settings.
premium.trialEndedPaywall: Your trial ended. Upgrade to continue.
premium.tryTrialDescription: Try Premium features free for 3 days.
premium.trialFullAccess: All premium features are open during your trial.
premium.fullAccessDescription: All premium features and unlimited suggestions are active.
premium.photoLocked: Photo features require an active trial or Premium.
premium.goDescription: Unlock more suggestions and more personal outfit planning.

paywall.title: Upgrade Your Style
paywall.subtitle: Look better every day with smart outfit suggestions

benefits.clothesUpload: Upload your clothes and get smart recommendations
benefits.appearanceStyle: Personalized style based on your appearance

paywall.iosOnlyMessage: Subscriptions are available in the iOS app.
paywall.simulatedNote: Premium access is activated after a successful subscription.
paywall.confirmDescription: You will be redirected to secure checkout. Premium unlocks after successful payment.
paywall.confirmDescriptionIos: Purchase is completed securely by Apple. After the 3-day free trial, the subscription starts automatically.

platformMessages.ios: 3-day free trial, then subscription starts automatically.

paymentResult.successDescription: Premium features are unlocked for your account. You can now use unlimited and advanced suggestions.
paymentResult.failedDescription: Payment could not be completed. You can try again or return to the app.

appearance.title: My Appearance
appearance.description: Edit your appearance profile so suggestions can better account for fit, proportion, and style goals.
appearance.emptyPhotosDescription: You can add up to 3 photos. After upload, edit the suggested fields.
appearance.analysisDescription: This still creates editable estimates. AI outfit feedback uses this context supportively and without stereotypes.
appearance.logicDescription: Slim and skinny-fat profiles prefer structure and layers; muscular profiles avoid hiding shape too much; overweight and plus-size profiles prefer clean lines and darker tones; petite and short profiles avoid long-top proportions.

outfitAnalysis.title: Outfit Check
outfitAnalysis.description: Upload an outfit photo to get an AI style rating, short feedback, and improvement suggestions.
outfitAnalysis.emptyDescription: Upload an outfit photo and the AI analysis will appear here.
outfitAnalysis.aiAnalysisFailed: The outfit photo could not be analyzed. Please try again.
outfitAnalysis.noSuggestions: No extra suggestion for this outfit.

comments.tooSimilar: Top and bottom are too similar.
comments.balanced: The overall balance looks clean and wearable.

suggestions.tryTop: Your {{item}} could improve the top-bottom balance.
suggestions.wardrobeLooksFine: This outfit already looks balanced with your current wardrobe.
suggestions.addWardrobe: Add a few more wardrobe items to get better alternatives.

seeOnMe.longWait: This is taking a little longer, your preview is still being prepared...
seeOnMe.photoDescription: A clear, well-lit, upright photo with one person gives the best result.
seeOnMe.noPhotoDescription: Upload a clear user photo before creating a preview.
seeOnMe.needPhoto: Choose or upload a clear full-body photo to continue.
seeOnMe.needOutfit: Use Home to generate an outfit before using See On Me.
seeOnMe.validationFailed: This photo is not quite suitable for preview. Try a clearer, brighter, upright full-body photo with one person.
seeOnMe.validationWarning: This photo may not be ideal, but you can still try.
seeOnMe.limitReached: Today's See On Me limit has been reached. Please try again later.
seeOnMe.unavailable: Preview could not be created right now. Please try again.
seeOnMe.serviceUnavailable: Our AI styling service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
seeOnMe.capacityUnavailable: AI previews are temporarily unavailable while we refresh capacity.
seeOnMe.configUnavailable: AI preview service is temporarily unavailable.
seeOnMe.organizationUnavailable: AI preview service is currently being upgraded. Please try again later.
seeOnMe.maintenance: See On Me is temporarily unavailable while we improve this feature.
seeOnMe.generationFailed: We couldn't create your preview this time. Please try again.
seeOnMe.timeout: Preview took too long to generate. Please retry.
seeOnMe.cooldown: Please wait before creating another preview.
seeOnMe.alreadyRunning: Your preview is already being prepared.
seeOnMe.tooManyAttempts: Too many preview attempts. Please try again shortly.
seeOnMe.uploadFailed: Photo could not be uploaded. Please try again.
